visits.note: Patient presents with complaint of fatigue and weight gain. Physical examination reveals BP 140/90 and BMI 32. Patient is diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, and Hyperlipidemia. Labs show HbA1c 7.5, BP 140/90, eGFR 80, and LDL 145.

Patient reports worsening fatigue and increased urination. Physical examination reveals BP 150/95 and BMI 33. Labs show HbA1c 9.0, BP 150/95, eGFR 70, and LDL 155. Medications are adjusted to Metformin 1000mg, Lisinopril 20mg, and Atorvastatin 40mg. Patient is diagnosed with Chronic Kidney Disease.

Patient reports chest pain and shortness of breath. Physical examination reveals BP 160/100 and BMI 34. Labs show HbA1c 8.5, BP 160/100, eGFR 65, and LDL 160. Medications are adjusted to Metformin 1500mg, Lisinopril 30mg, and Atorvastatin 60mg. Patient is diagnosed with Coronary Artery Disease.

Patient reports worsening shortness of breath. Physical examination reveals BP 155/105 and BMI 35. Labs show HbA1c 8.0, BP 155/105, eGFR 60, and LDL 165. Medications are adjusted to Metformin 2000mg, Lisinopril 40mg, and Atorvastatin 80mg. Patient is referred to cardiology for further evaluation.
